text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the All Comers. When we arrive at
Nakayama Racecourse, who else do we find
waiting outside but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Twin Turbo says she's feeling super turbocharged
and that she'll definitely win! Riding that wave of
confidence, she challenges Matikanetannhauser...
